auth.loginSubtitle: Use your email and password to continue.
auth.registerSubtitle: Create your account to get started.
auth.pleaseWait: Please wait while we verify your email address...
auth.emailVerifiedSuccess: Your email has been successfully verified. Your account is now active and ready to use.
auth.verificationLinkInvalid: Verification link is invalid or has expired.
auth.requestNewVerification: Please request a new verification email.
auth.verificationSafety: For your security, verification links expire after 24 hours.
auth.resendVerificationDescription: Enter your email address below and we'll send you a new verification link.
auth.verificationEmailSent: We've sent a verification email to {email}. Please check your inbox.
auth.spamFolderNote: If you don't see the email, please check your spam folder.
auth.somethingWentWrong: Something went wrong. Please try again.

home.title: Clean auth and dashboard starter for Task Manager
home.description: Login, register, main and dashboard pages are split into separate layouts. UI flow is ready, next step is connecting API/auth logic fully.

features.label: Features
features.heading: Crafted for Modern Web
features.subheading: A completely responsive, dynamic, and stunning application structure ready for your next big idea.

speed.title: Lightning Fast
speed.desc: Optimized performance resulting in zero load times and snappy interactions.

secure.title: Secure by Default
secure.desc: Advanced security protocols out of the box to protect your sensitive data and keep your app safe.

design.title: Beautiful UI
design.desc: Crafted with attention to detail and a strong focus on modern design aesthetics and experience.

dashboard.title: Welcome to your dashboard
dashboard.subtitle: Current state, tasks, and team activity are shown here.

errorPage.title: Something went wrong
errorPage.notFoundMessage: The page you are looking for does not exist.

validation.stringEmail: {field} must be a valid email address.
validation.objectMissing: Provide at least one field to update.

errors.userAlreadyExists: User with this email already exists.
errors.otpInvalidOrExpired: OTP code is invalid or expired.
errors.resetTokenInvalidOrExpired: Reset token is invalid or expired.
errors.verificationTokenInvalidOrExpired: Verification token is invalid or expired.
errors.refreshTokenNotValidAnymore: Refresh token is not valid anymore.
errors.tooManyRequests: Too many requests. Please try again later.

success.registerVerifyWithEmail: Registration successful. Verify email via link or OTP code.
success.registerVerifyResendNotConfigured: Registration successful. Configure RESEND to enable email verification.
success.forgotPasswordSent: If that email exists, a reset link and OTP code have been sent.
success.passwordResetSuccess: Password reset successful. Please login again.
